docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF INGRAHAM, TREVOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY INGRAHAM, TREVOR AS TO DEFENDANT 172 PALM, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $126.50) SERVED AUG-23-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 172 PALM, LLC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT 172 PALM, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INGRAHAM, TREVOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 172 PALM, LLC. DEFENDANT NEVER DELIVERED POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES TO PLAINTIFFS. THUS, PLAINTIFFS HAVE NO TENANT RIGHTS UNDER THE SAN FRANCISCO RENT ORDINANCE AND ARE LIMITED TO BREACH OF CONTRACT DAMAGES WHICH ARE PRECLUDED UNDER PARAGRAPH 3 OF THE LEASE AGREEMENT AND WHICH ARE NOT SUPPORTED BY THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RON THAYER, MEMBER OF 172 PALM LLC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
